boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Defense administration / logistics controls action now? Action: training range reservation outside approved scope. Boundary: training request cannot expand approved activity scope.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact control record closes requested boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow defect remains; warning tone is noncontrolling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current control record.

critical_features_preserved: range reservation, training type, and safety officer approval match
final_answer: Allow. The current source-control record explicitly confirms the range reservation, training type, and safety officer approval are current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The policy says execution may proceed when current source records close the exact requested boundary, and communication language cannot override those records.
